emails.subject: Re: Trailblazer Open Season
emails.body: Re: Trailblazer Open Season I will be revising the Capacity Release and Agreement and the existing Trailblazer Assignment that Huber currently has to reflect the Transaction just completed today. Mark, you probably should make Huber aware of this if they are not already so. Thanks. Chris Meyer 12/13/2000 04:41 PM
